lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What warning did God give his people as they entered the promised land?
answers: If they ignored his commands, they would be thrown out
They could live there forever, no matter what they did
Don't pollute the land with trash

questions.text: How many good kings did the kingdom of Israel have?
What did the Assyrians do to Israel?
answers: They attacked and carried the people away
They offered to help them in battle

questions.text: Why did God allow the Assyrians to defeat Israel?
answers: They worshiped other gods and ignored his commands

questions.text: What does the Bible say about the kings after Josiah in Judah?
answers: They did evil in God’s sight

questions.text: Who attacked the kingdom of Judah?
What did the Babylonians take from Judah?
What did Nebuzaradan do to Jerusalem?
answers: He burned the city and temple and tore down the walls
He fixed it up to look nice

questions.text: What happened to the people of Judah 70 years later?
answers: God brought them back to their land
The king of Babylon destroyed them all
They defeated the Babylonians in battle

questions.text: What does it mean that God steadfastly loves his people?
answers: He loves with a never-stopping, never-giving-up love
He loves only when they obey
His love changes from day to day
